contract: until 2029 with an option for one year
headline: Hauke Wahl joins Wolfsburg from St. Pauli for over €2m
body: VfL Wolfsburg has reached a full agreement with FC St. Pauli for the transfer of centre-back Hauke Wahl for more than €2m, with a contract until 2029 plus an option for one year.
text:
🚨🏁




Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨💥 Hauke Wahl to VfL Wolfsburg - DONE DEAL ✔️

Full agreement with FC St. Pauli now reached. Transfer fee for the 32 y/o centre-back: more than €2m with add-ons included. Contract until 2029 + 1. Medical currently being scheduled. 

Negotiations were already at an advanced stage yesterday, as @rupertfabig reported. Now done. @SkySportDE 🇩🇪





— https://nitter.net/Plettigoal/status/2068047487458508943#m
